violations.finding: Two bare `python3 -c` invocations in the Step 2 pre-push snapshot bash block: `python3 -c "import hashlib, os; ..."` (REPO_HASH) and `python3 -c "import secrets; ..."` (REQUEST_ID). These are inline python3 calls without venv activation.
violations.recommendation: Extract hash/nonce computation to a utility script (e.g., scripts/compute-repo-hash.sh and scripts/generate-nonce.sh) or use pure bash alternatives (e.g., sha256sum + cut for hash, openssl rand for nonce). If python3 is required, activate venv first: `source venv/bin/activate || source .venv/bin/activate`.

violations.finding: Two bare `python3 -c` invocations in the Step 1 pre-merge snapshot bash block: `python3 -c "import hashlib, os; ..."` (REPO_HASH) and `python3 -c "import secrets; ..."` (REQUEST_ID). Identical pattern to push.md violation.
violations.recommendation: Same as push.md: extract to utility scripts or use bash alternatives. If python3 must be used inline, activate venv first. Consolidating REPO_HASH / REQUEST_ID computation into a single shared helper script (e.g., `scripts/agentic-commit-prelude.sh`) would also eliminate the duplication between push.md and merge.md.

notes.standard-1-rationale: Code blocks in push.md, merge.md, pull.md, push-analyst.md, merge-analyst.md, pull-analyst.md are protocol/workflow definitions executed via the agent's Bash tool. This is the established project pattern (changelog-analyst.md, which was not flagged in prior cycles, has identical structure with 20+ bash blocks). The agent files ARE the implementation — extraction to external scripts is architecturally inappropriate for subagent workflow definitions.
notes.standard-2-rationale: /root/.claude/ path strings in pretool-cp-checkin.py appear only in comments (documentation references, not code paths). /tmp/* entries in tool-policy.v1.json are path-policy configuration values, not hardcoded operational paths in script logic.
notes.standard-6-note: Standard 6 unconditional scan ran against all agents/ and commands/ directories. Pre-existing Chinese text found in commands/dev.md:253,1400,1402 — this is NOT in scope (not a changed file in this cycle). No Chinese characters found in any of the 8 changed files.
notes.standard-10-rationale: merge.md references ~/.claude/scripts/derive-default-branch.sh (not a repo-relative scripts/ path). This resolves to /root/.claude/scripts/derive-default-branch.sh which exists. All hook references (push.sh, merge.sh, pull.sh) exist in hooks/.
